data.title: FDA-cleared Lotus catheter expands globally with 500,000+ uses, zero UTIs in 50-patient study, and scaling up manufacturing.
data.description: Lotus Medical Technologies, based in Largo, Florida, reported promising results from a recent study conducted at the University of South Florida. The study, which included 50 patients, found that the non-balloon catheter manufactured by the company resulted in zero Urinary Tract Infections (UTIs) among the participants. This catheter has been used over 500,000 times worldwide. In response to the positive findings, Lotus Medical Technologies is strategically finalizing distributor partnerships and expanding its manufacturing capabilities to meet the growing demand for this innovative product.

data.title: Steve Blazejewski joins Hawkeye Partners in Austin to pursue seniors housing opportunities, as Senior Managing Director and Partner.
data.description: AUSTIN, Texas - Today, Hawkeye Partners, a prominent real estate investment management firm, welcomed Steve Blazejewski as their new Senior Managing Director and Partner. Blazejewski joins the team to lead their seniors housing initiatives and drive further expansion. This move underscores the company's commitment to growth in this sector. No details have been provided regarding the specific numbers involved, but this addition signals a strategic step for Hawkeye Partners in bolstering its seniors housing portfolio.

data.title: AARP names winners of 2026 Purpose Prize for nonprofit leaders over 50 driving change. Hails knowledge and dedication.
data.description: The 2026 AARP® Purpose Prize® award winners have been announced by AARP, recognizing nonprofit founders aged 50 and above for their impactful contributions. This annual award celebrates individuals who leverage their wisdom, life skills, and commitment to make a difference in society. Each year, recipients are chosen based on their dedication to driving positive change through their organizations.
Mink Ventures increases private placement to $1,000,000 from earlier announcement.

data.title: Keysight launches EV2020B and EV2020BE test platforms to accelerate electric vehicle production, reduce costs.
data.description: Keysight Technologies, Inc. has recently introduced the EV2020B EV Manufacturing Functional Test Platform and the EV2020BE EV Manufacturing Functional Test Platform for EVSE in Santa Rosa, California. This expansion of their end-of-line (EOL) test portfolio aims to assist automakers and electric vehicle supply equipment (EVSE) manufacturers in improving their production testing processes. The platforms offer scalability and flexibility, enabling a quicker time-to-market, cost reduction, and readiness assurance. With the launch of these solutions, Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) continues to innovate and support the growing EV industry.
IMF Spokesperson Kozack: Global inflation is a mixed picture, with headline inflation higher in the UK, India, and Australia. Core inflation is higher in the US.

data.title: Trinity Energy creates large-scale energy independence at Costco with new solar, storage, and EV charging solution.
data.description: Trinity Energy, a prominent supplier of sustainable energy solutions, has recently completed pre-commissioning of an extensive solar, battery storage, and electric vehicle (EV) charging system at Costco Wholesale’s distribution centers in Mira Loma and Ontario, California. This development is pivotal in Costco's journey towards energy self-sufficiency. The Mira Loma site, Costco’s biggest distribution center worldwide, has now embraced this eco-friendly solution. This initiative signifies a major move within the retail sector towards renewable energy adoption and environmental sustainability.

data.title: Terra Innovatum and GSR III Acquisition Corp. secure $5 million PIPE commitment, totaling $42.5 million for business combination.
data.description: A partnership between Terra Innovatum Srl and GSR III Acquisition Corp. revealed on Oct. 2, 2025, an increase in private investment in public equity ("PIPE") capital as part of their merger. The total equity funding allocated reached $42.5 million, with around $37 million coming from PIPE funding and roughly $5.5 million from a bridge facility. Notably, the public company involved was Nasdaq-listed GSRT. This move signifies a significant financial commitment to support the development of micro-modular nuclear reactors.

data.title: PROtect acquires Airde Mechanical Services to expand capabilities in high-access infrastructure, with expertise in rope access and suspended platforms.
data.description: PROtect, LLC based in WICHITA, Kan., has recently acquired a company specializing in rope access, suspended platforms, and complex access solutions. This acquisition is set to enhance PROtect's national platform and strengthen its position in the market. The move was confirmed on Oct. 2, 2025, as part of PROtect's strategy to expand its expertise. This acquisition adds valuable resources and expertise to PROtect's portfolio, contributing to its safety, reliability, and compliance services.

data.title: New Richmond American community, Pine Grove Reserve, debuts in St. Cloud, Fla. with designer homes. Opening announced on Oct. 1, 2025.
data.description: In St. Cloud, Florida, on October 1, 2025, Richmond American Homes of Florida, LP, under Sekisui House U.S., Inc., is proud to introduce the Grand Opening of Pine Grove Reserve. This new community presents a range of luxurious homes featuring designer details. The development showcases an impressive collection of houses, with the opening event marking an exciting milestone for the company.
